economic_notes: GBEs include Z'gamok Enterprises Inc., Z'gamok Enterprises LP, and Z'gamok Construction LP. First Nation has 11.78% interest in Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP which owns and manages a hotel. Sagamok Development Corporation and Ritchie Falls Resort are consolidated subsidiaries.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Large increase in deferred ISC revenue from $6.9M to $19.0M contributed to significant cash increase. ISC funding per confirmation was $34.3M but only $20.1M recognized as revenue. Restricted cash includes CMHC replacement reserves ($1,273,820) and consolidated revenue fund ($862,580). Net debt position of -$2,962,500. GBE share of income $1,103,705 included in surplus above operating line. Two consolidated subsidiaries: Sagamok Development Corporation and Ritchie Falls Resort (2344827 Ontario Inc.). Three GBEs under modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided text. Housing expenses estimated from On-Reserve Housing, Housing Administration, Housing Renovations, CMHC Housing Phase 22, and Community Housing line items. Social expenses estimated from First Nations Child Care Initiative, Day Nursery Program, and Employment Programs.
